title: Produce the M2 work logistics vertical slice plan
summary: Create the reviewed M2 plan and task DAG for the work/logistics vertical slice defined by WM-0030-m2-entry-prompt.md. This is a planning/control task only: it must define allowed and forbidden paths, dependencies, acceptance criteria, required checks, benchmark impact, review routing, rollback model and owner gates before any M2 implementation starts.
acceptance: Plan contains an acyclic M2 task DAG starting with planning and excluding M3
Every M2 task packet lists objective allowed paths forbidden paths dependencies owner reviewer acceptance required checks benchmark impact review routing rollback model and Spark eligibility
Plan preserves Worker/headless authority sim-core purity bounded indexed work selection serializable jobs structured reasons save/replay and parity gates

Scope stays inside work/logistics vertical slice and excludes broad economy town-life anomaly combat platform save UI content expansion and balance production unless explicitly justified as scaffolding
No implementation branch is started by WM-0032
Owner gates and independent reviewer verification pass

history.details: WM-0031 is done; M2 entry prompt requires a reviewed planning task before implementation.

Produced the reviewed M2 work/logistics planning package: added the M2 roadmap plan, WM-0033 through WM-0043 proposed task DAG with required packet fields, and WM-0032 report; no runtime implementation or M3 work started; required checks passed.

verified: No blocking findings; M2 DAG is acyclic and starts with WM-0033 planning plus WM-0034 architecture gate before implementation; WM-0033-WM-0043 packets include required fields; scope and gates preserve Worker/headless authority, sim-core purity, bounded indexed selection, serializable jobs, structured reasons, save/replay and Worker parity; no runtime implementation files changed; owner gates reproduced.

Verified M2 planning package integrated on task branch; reviewer approved; integration gates passed: validate-handoff 557 files/43 tasks/10 roles, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.

review.summary: No blocking findings; M2 DAG is acyclic and starts with WM-0033 planning plus WM-0034 architecture gate before implementation; WM-0033-WM-0043 packets include required fields; scope and gates preserve Worker/headless authority, sim-core purity, bounded indexed selection, serializable jobs, structured reasons, save/replay and Worker parity; no runtime implementation files changed; owner gates reproduced.

integration.summary: Verified M2 planning package integrated on task branch; reviewer approved; integration gates passed: validate-handoff 557 files/43 tasks/10 roles, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check and pnpm quality.
